title: Pterygodium atratum

The health benefits of Pterygodium atratum are largely attributed to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which may be useful in treating various conditions such as wounds, respiratory infections, and skin irritations. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, terpenoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Pterygodium atratum is typically prepared as a herbal tea or an extract, and is also used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world, including South Africa and Asia.
